prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 72.8 kg; Height 169.5 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 8.7%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 204mg/dL; 9 months ago 196mg/dL; 6 months ago 222mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 74.9kg; 9 months ago 74.3kg; 6 months ago 71.1kg; 3 months ago 74.7kg; current 72.8kg), Height (12 months ago 169.5cm; 9 months ago 169.5cm; 6 months ago 169.5cm; 3 months ago 169.5cm; current 169.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 75mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; current 73mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 74mg/g; 9 months ago 92mg/g; 6 months ago 97mg/g; 3 months ago 94mg/g; current 81mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 34mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 150mg/dL; 6 months ago 149mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 142mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.8g/dL; 9 months ago 13.4g/dL; 6 months ago 12.7g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
